history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A full-body shot of a young person with their hair tied in a ponytail, wearing sunglasses, a dark t-shirt, a cream-colored zip-up hoodie, and loose black pants. They are standing on a wooden boardwalk, leaning against a wooden railing, looking off to the right. The background features a misty, mountainous landscape with lush green trees and rocky terrain. Wisps of steam or fog rise from the ground, suggesting a geothermal area. The lighting is bright and natural, casting shadows on the boardwalk. The color palette is dominated by earthy tones of brown and green, contrasted with the bright sky and the person's clothing. The overall mood is serene and adventurous. The bottom of the image shows a navigation bar with icons for "Beranda" (Home), "Teman" (Friends), a plus sign for creating content, "Kotak Masuk" (Inbox) with a notification count of "99+", and "Profil" (Profile). The phone's status bar at the top shows the time "08.42", battery icon, Wi-Fi signal, and notification icons.
